hero.title: Home cleaning you can actually trust.
hero.subtitle: Every Sweepr is background-screened, identity-verified, and trained before they ever enter your home. Upfront pricing, liability coverage on every booking, and a satisfaction guarantee — so you never have to wonder.

howItWorks.title: Book with confidence. Come home to clean.
howItWorks.subtitle: From background checks to real-time tracking — here's what happens when you book with Sweepr.
howItWorks.step1Title: Every Sweepr is vetted — before they can work
howItWorks.step1Body: Identity verification, third-party background check, and platform training are required before any Sweepr can accept a single booking.
howItWorks.step2Body: Standard clean, deep clean, move-in, move-out, recurring — with upfront pricing shown before you commit to anything.
howItWorks.step3Title: Track your Sweepr in real time
howItWorks.step3Body: You'll know when they're on the way and when they arrive. Your address is only shared once they're confirmed and en route.
howItWorks.step4Body: Every booking is covered by liability insurance. If anything's not right, report it within 48 hours — we'll send someone back or refund you.

services.title: Every service. Every standard.
services.subtitle: From a regular maintenance clean to a full move-out deep clean — all performed by screened, insured professionals.
services.standardDesc: All rooms, surfaces, floors, and fixtures get the attention they need. Bathrooms cleaned and sanitised, kitchen wiped down, floors swept and mopped. The kind of clean that resets a home without requiring you to be there for it.
services.deepDesc: Everything in a Standard Clean, plus inside appliances, baseboards, window sills, light switches, ceiling fans, and all those spots that collect a surprising amount of history. A genuine reset for a home that needs one.
services.deepBestFor: First-time bookings, seasonal resets, or pre-event prep
services.apartmentTagline: Sized for your space, not a four-bedroom house.
services.apartmentDesc: Full clean tailored to apartments and condos. Everything cleaned thoroughly without padding the time or the price for rooms you don't have.
services.moveInTagline: Start fresh in a space that's actually clean.
services.moveInDesc: A full empty-home clean before your things go in. Inside cabinets, closets, appliances, and every surface — so your new place feels like yours from day one.
services.moveInBestFor: New tenants and homeowners before moving in
services.moveOutTagline: Leave the place better than you found it.
services.moveOutDesc: Designed to meet lease-end standards. Full empty-home clean including inside appliances, inside cabinets, all fixtures, and floors. The kind of clean that tends to get deposits back.
services.moveOutBestFor: End of lease or sale handover
services.recurringTagline: Your home, kept. Without thinking about it.
services.recurringDesc: Weekly or biweekly visits at a lower per-visit rate. You're matched with the same Sweepr each time, so they know your home and you don't have to explain it again. Pause or cancel anytime.
services.recurringBestFor: Anyone who wants a consistently clean home without the effort
services.addOnsTagline: Extra attention where you need it.
services.addOnsDesc: Inside fridge, inside oven, interior windows, laundry, organisation, or a longer clean for a larger home. Add them at booking — your price updates immediately.
services.addOnsBestFor: Any booking that needs something extra

trust.title: The cleaners in your home have been thoroughly screened. That's not optional.
trust.subtitle: Background checks, identity verification, insurance, and training — required for every Sweepr, before their first job.
trust.screenedBody: Identity verification, government ID checks, and a third-party background screen — completed before any Sweepr can accept their first job. We re-screen on an ongoing basis.
trust.liabilityBody: Every Sweepr booking includes liability coverage. If something gets damaged, you're not on your own. Accidents are rare — being covered shouldn't be.
trust.trackingBody: Know exactly when your Sweepr is en route, when they arrive, and when the job is done. Your address is only shared once they're confirmed.
trust.guaranteeBody: Not satisfied? Report it within 48 hours. We send your Sweepr back to fix it, or we refund the booking. No negotiating, no forms, no runaround.

pricing.title: Upfront pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Your exact price is shown before you book. Here are some common examples — use the calculator to get your number.
pricing.comingSoonTitle: We're still polishing the price tags.
pricing.comingSoonSubtitle: Our pricing calculator is getting a final deep clean. Join the newsletter and we'll let you know as soon as the numbers are finalized.

faq.title: Good questions
faq.a1: Your exact price is shown before you book — based on service type, number of bedrooms and bathrooms, and any add-ons you select. There are no hidden fees, no charges after the fact, and no surprises when the invoice arrives.
faq.a2: Every Sweepr completes identity verification, a third-party background check, and training before they can accept jobs on the platform. We review work history and ratings on an ongoing basis. If a Sweepr's standards slip, they don't stay active.
faq.a3: Yes. Cancel or reschedule for free up to 24 hours before your appointment. Changes made inside that window may incur a small fee.
faq.q4: What if the job isn't done right?
faq.a4: Report it within 48 hours and we'll send your Sweepr back to fix it — or refund the booking. We're not interested in arguing about it.
faq.q5: Do Sweeprs bring their own supplies?
faq.a5: Yes. Every Sweepr arrives with professional-grade equipment and supplies. If you'd prefer they use yours instead, leave a note when you book.
faq.q6: Will I get the same Sweepr each time?
faq.a6: Sweeprs are assigned on a best-match basis — factoring in location, availability, ratings, and job type — so you'll always get the right person for the job. If you've worked with a Sweepr before and want to request them again, you can do that from your booking history.
faq.a7: Recurring bookings are billed per visit at a lower rate than one-time cleans. Pause or cancel anytime — no lock-in.
faq.a8: Enter your address when you book and we'll show you real availability in your area. We're expanding regularly — if we're not in your city yet, you can join the waitlist.

cleaner.subtitle: Learn about training, requirements, and available service areas.

newsletter.subtitle: Get notified about new service areas, features, and promotions.
